ManagedAttribute.displayName: Read and write your organization's application configuration policies [on] Microsoft Graph

entry.value: Allows the app to read and write your organization's application configuration policies, without a signed-in user. This includes policies such as activityBasedTimeoutPolicy, claimsMappingPolicy, homeRealmDiscoveryPolicy, tokenIssuancePolicy and tokenLifetimePolicy.
Read and write your organization's application configuration policies [on] Microsoft Graph
